name: Tamale Pie III
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry bacon until crisp; break into large pieces. Set aside.
2. Chill bacon drippings until firm for use in the crust.
3. Brown ground beef in a large skillet; drain off fat.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients (chopped green chiles, cornmeal, oregano, chili powder, salt, black pepper, cumin).
5. Prepare the pie crust and use it to line a 9-inch pie pan. Place the meat mixture in the pan.
6. Bake at 425°F for 25 minutes.
7. Meanwhile, combine egg, evaporated milk, mustard, and Jack cheese. Spread on top of the pie.
8. Decorate with reserved bacon pieces and sliced olives.
9. Bake for an additional 5 minutes, or until the cheese melts.
10. Let stand for 10 minutes, or until firm before serving.
